## Feature Completion Checklist

Per [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md), a feature is complete only when all applicable items are done:

- [ ] Implementation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] User documentation (`docs/user-guide/`)
- [ ] API documentation (`docs/api/`, if applicable)
- [ ] SDK documentation (`docs/sdk/`, if applicable)
- [ ] Examples (`examples/`, if applicable)
- [ ] Changelog entry (`CHANGELOG.md`)
- [ ] RFC updated (if architecture changed)
